children.heading: .—Federal Charter
children.label: a .—Federal Charter
children.text: United States Capitol Historical Society (in this chapter, the “corporation”) is a federally chartered corporation.

children.heading: .—Place of Incorporation
children.label: b .—Place of Incorporation
children.text: The corporation is declared to be incorporated in the District of Columbia.

children.heading: .—Perpetual Existence
children.label: c .—Perpetual Existence
children.text: Except as otherwise provided, the corporation has perpetual existence.
